headline: JPMorgan slashes Coinbase price target
summary: JPMorgan has slashed its price target on Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) to $196 from $283. This is nearly a 31% cut, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating on the largest U.S. crypto exchange. The revision, led by analyst Kenneth Worthington, still implies roughly 24% upside from the ...

headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc.
summary: Transparency notification byJP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by JP Morgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. that its subsidiary, JP Morgan Asset Management (UK) Limited, has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights upwards on 13 July 2026.
